Howard Skebe of COOLEY MANION JONES KUROWSKI LLP (415-512-4381), appearing for defendant / moving party Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT TEMPORARY PLANT CLEANERS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.'s general demurrer to plaintiff's complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give plaintiff an opportunity, if he is able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical (1999) 21 Cal.4th 71. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
